{{Quote|Or with the skyboats on Xoman Three when you exposed the traitor and recovered the little princess from the pirates! That was ''awesome!''<nowiki></nowiki>|[[Xiaan Amersu]], to [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]]|<ref name="HoF" />}}
'''Xoman III''',<ref name="FF103">{{FactFile|103|VOS 7-8|Quinlan Vos}}</ref> or '''Xoman Three''',<ref name="HoF" /> also known as '''Xoman Free''',<ref name="SW36">[[Star Wars (1998) 36|''Star Wars'' (1998) 36]]</ref> was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Halla sector/Legends|Halla sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].

==History==
At some point between c. [[38 BBY/Legends|38 BBY]]<ref name="JAS">''[[Jedi: Aayla Secura]]''</ref><ref name="JCF">{{JCFCite|url=posts/13327474|board=Literature|thread=The Official Jan Duursema Discussion Thread|user=Jan_Duursema|date=2003-09-25|time=10:08 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20180625181621/http://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-jan-duursema-discussion-thread.5915607/page-36|quote=Aayla was 2 when Quin and Tholme found her on Ryloth. Quin was 11. So there's 9 years difference in age. Quin is Obi-Wan's age--which I think was stated as 25 during Ep I. So Aayla would be 16 at the time of Ep I.}} {{C|Note: In response to a question directed to [[Jan Duursema]] by [[Billy Buehler]] (aka The2ndQuest) on the [[Jedi Council Forums]], Jan Duursema explained that Aayla "would have been about 10" & "Quin about 19" during the flashback sequence in ''[[Jedi: Aayla Secura]]'' depicting Quinlan Vos taking Aayla as his Padawan.}}</ref> and [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]],<ref name="Twilight">''[[Star Wars: Twilight]]''</ref><ref name="TCC">''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]''</ref> the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] went on a [[Mission to Xoman III|mission]] to Xoman III, where they exposed a traitor and rescued a [[Unidentified princess|young princess]] who had been kidnapped by [[skyboat]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]].<ref name="HoF" /><ref name="SW36" /><ref name="FF103" />

{{Planet-stub}}
